name: EUR/USD

setup.waiting: Downtrend intact — waiting for a pullback to the 8-EMA to go short.

patterns.name: Tweezer bottom
patterns.note: A pattern with no level is just a candle. Ignore it.

chartist.read: Daily bearish, price under the EMAs; choppy. RSI 50.0. Nearest level 1.14 (23.0 pips). No trigger at a level yet.

quant.read: Volatility dead/coiling (1H ATR ~7 pips). No edge in a low-vol mid-range — size would be minimum.

risk.read: Gate CLOSED. Nothing fits the 1% rule right now — the veto holds, capital protected.

trade.read: On standby until a level and a clean trigger appear together.
